score_evidence.completeness: All 8 program spaces present with name, qty, and size_sqm: Guest Room (15×55), Restaurant (200), Infinity Pool+Deck (300), Reception (100), Back of House (150), Staff Facilities (80), Spa (200), Circulation (145). total_sqm=2000. assumptions array present and detailed.
score_evidence.accuracy: Math verified: 15×55=825 + 200+300+100+150+80+200+145=1175. Total=825+1175=2000sqm. Exact match. Calculation verified within the assumptions field itself.
score_evidence.clarity: Matrix is standalone-readable. Each space has notes explaining source (per client spec, per client program, assumed). No back-reference to conversation needed.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 per simulated run rule — no live Asana.
score_evidence.timing: Area program produced as part of Segment C parallel track with site readiness. Available before DG-03.
score_evidence.decision_readiness: Assumptions address all points where client input was incomplete or inferred: guest room size, pool deck interpretation, circulation estimate, sustainability systems placement. Marcela can evaluate with full context. Hydrology note in assumptions flags stream setback impact on infinity pool siting.

decision_commentary: Perfect area program. All spaces accounted for, math verified, assumptions thorough. TC-008 specific note: Ana correctly flags that 'infinity pool 300sqm includes pool basin and surrounding deck — structural setback from stream will need to be confirmed via hydrologic study' — exactly the right flag for this edge case.
celia_routing_notes: DG-03 (decision-event-dg03.json) correctly routes to Tomás. All 11 payload fields present. Comment preserved: 'Proceed with scope preparation. Hydrology blocker noted — ensure activation gate holds until study received.'
